title: Tree Damage Near Garage Entrance — Please Exercise Caution
body: A section of a tree near the dumpsters at the end of the driveway is damaged and leaning on other branches and the Verizon wires. The Fire Department inspected the tree tonight. As the tree is part of the aqueduct and on the other side of the fence off our property, we were advised to contact the county DPW, which we have done. Please exercise caution when entering and exiting the garage with your vehicle or walking by the area. We hope to receive direction from DPW on Monday regarding the steps they will take to address the situation. Thank you and please be safe.

title: Annual Shareholder Election — June 8, 2026
body: The annual election for Board of Directors positions will be held on June 8, 2026. All shareholders in good standing are eligible to vote. Ballots and candidate information will be distributed in advance. Contact the board for details.

title: Welcome to the 555 McLean Ave Resident Portal
body: This website is your central resource for building news, meeting schedules, and community announcements. Bookmark this page and check back regularly for updates.

title: Spring Building Inspection
body: Our annual spring inspection of common areas, roof, and mechanical systems is underway. Access to certain areas may be temporarily restricted. Thank you for your patience.

title: Maintenance Fee Payment Reminder
body: Monthly maintenance fees are due on the 1st of each month. Please ensure payments are submitted on time to avoid late charges. Contact the managing agent with any questions.
